section: UNITED STATES HOUSE OF REPRESENTATIVES 2021 FINANCIAL DISCLOSURE STATEMENT
free_text:
# United States House of Representatives 2021 Financial Disclosure Statement

Form A - For Use by Members, Officers, and Employees

Name: Rohit Khanna
Daytime Telephone: 202-225-2631

Filer Status: Member of the U.S. House of Representatives
State: CA
District: 17
Officer or Employee: unchecked
Staff Filer Type (If Applicable): Shared unchecked; Principal Assistant unchecked

Report Type: 2021 Annual (Due May 16, 2022) unchecked; Amendment checked; Termination unchecked; Date of Termination blank

## Preliminary Information

A. Did you, your spouse, or your dependent child: a. Own any reportable asset that was worth more than $1,000 at the end of the reporting period? b. Receive more than $200 in unearned income from any reportable asset during the reporting period? Yes checked; No unchecked

B. Did you, your spouse, or your dependent child purchase, sell, or exchange any reportable asset where a transaction exceeded $1,000 during the reporting period? Yes checked; No unchecked

C. Did you or your spouse have "earned" income (e.g., salaries, honoraria, or pension/IRA distributions) of $200 or more during the reporting period? Yes unchecked; No checked

D. Did you, your spouse, or your dependent child have any reportable liability (more than $10,000) at any point during the reporting period? Yes checked; No unchecked

E. Did you hold any reportable positions during the reporting period or in the current calendar year up through the date of filing? Yes checked; No unchecked

F. Did you have any reportable agreement or arrangement with an outside entity during the reporting period or in the current calendar year up through the date of filing? Yes unchecked; No checked

G. Did you, your spouse, or your dependent child receive any reportable gift(s) totaling more than $415 in value from a single source during the reporting period? Yes unchecked; No checked

H. Did you, your spouse, or your dependent child receive any reportable travel or reimbursements for travel totaling more than $415 in value from a single source during the reporting period? Yes unchecked; No checked

I. Did any individual or organization make a donation to charity in lieu of paying you for a speech, appearance, or article during the reporting period? Yes unchecked; No checked

ATTACH THE CORRESPONDING SCHEDULE IF YOU ANSWER "YES"

## IPO and Exclusion of Spouse, Dependent, or Trust Information

IPO - Did you purchase any shares that were allocated as a part of an Initial Public Offering during the reporting period? If you answered "yes" to this question, please contact the Committee on Ethics for further guidance. Yes unchecked; No checked

TRUSTS - Details regarding "Qualified Blind Trusts" approved by the Committee on Ethics and certain other "excepted trusts" need not be disclosed. Have you excluded from this report details of such a trust benefiting you, your spouse, or dependent child? Yes unchecked; No checked

EXEMPTION - Have you excluded from this report any other assets, "unearned" income, transactions, or liabilities of a spouse or your dependent child because they meet all three tests for exemption? Do not answer "yes" unless you have first consulted with the Committee on Ethics. Yes unchecked; No checked

uncertainties.note: stamp is faint; not included as a form field beyond this uncertainty note
